sources.claim: Ruff is installable via PyPI/pip/uv/pipx and supports ruff check / ruff format commands.
Semgrep CLI supports scan/ci commands, JSON/SARIF/JUnit output, config selection, metrics controls, and exit codes.
OWASP Secure Coding Practices provides checklist categories covering validation, access control, logging, data protection, file management, memory management, and general coding.

summary: Stage 10 installs scanner profiles rather than ungoverned scanner packages; real scanner availability remains optional if deterministic fallback baseline exists.
